conditions.summary_zh: 胸痛合併呼吸困難、冒冷汗、手臂或下顎放射痛時需優先排除。
conditions.summary_en: Prioritize when chest pain occurs with dyspnea, diaphoresis, or arm/jaw radiation.
ask_next: 立即確認心電圖 ECG、血壓、血氧、疼痛開始時間與是否持續。 / Check ECG, blood pressure, oxygen saturation, onset time, and whether pain persists.
補問冒冷汗、噁心、下顎或手臂放射痛、既往冠心病與危險因子。 / Ask about diaphoresis, nausea, jaw/arm radiation, CAD history, and risk factors.

conditions.name_zh: 急性心包膜炎或心肌炎
conditions.summary_zh: 姿勢性或胸膜性胸痛合併呼吸困難、發燒、心悸或心跳過快時需納入心包膜炎/心肌炎。
conditions.summary_en: Include when positional or pleuritic chest pain occurs with dyspnea, fever, palpitations, or tachycardia.
ask_next: 確認胸痛是否受姿勢、深呼吸、咳嗽或平躺影響，並記錄起始時間與持續性。 / Ask whether pain changes with position, deep breathing, cough, or lying supine, and clarify onset and persistence.
確認發燒或病毒前驅症狀、呼吸困難、心悸、昏厥、血流不穩、ECG/心肌酵素與心包積液風險。 / Check fever or viral prodrome, dyspnea, palpitations, syncope, instability, ECG/troponin clues, and pericardial effusion risk.

conditions.summary_zh: 突發單側無力、言語或視覺改變、神經學缺損需立即處理。
conditions.summary_en: Sudden unilateral weakness, speech/vision changes, or focal deficit require urgent action.
ask_next: 確認最後正常時間、FAST/BE-FAST 徵象、抗凝血藥與血糖。 / Confirm last-known-well time, FAST/BE-FAST signs, anticoagulants, and glucose.
不要延誤急性中風流程；需要急診/中風團隊評估。 / Do not delay acute stroke pathway evaluation.

conditions.summary_zh: 感染表現合併意識改變、呼吸困難、低血壓或心搏過速時需優先排除。
conditions.summary_en: Suspect when infection features occur with confusion, dyspnea, hypotension, or tachycardia.
ask_next: 確認感染來源、血壓、呼吸頻率、尿量、乳酸與器官灌流狀態。 / Check infection source, blood pressure, respiratory rate, urine output, lactate, and perfusion.
若不穩定，依急症流程處理，不等待完整鑑別列表。 / If unstable, follow emergency care pathways without waiting for a full list.

conditions.summary_zh: 近期癌症治療或免疫低下合併發燒時，需優先納入發熱性嗜中性球低下與感染風險。
conditions.summary_en: Prioritize when fever occurs after recent cancer therapy or with immunocompromise.
ask_next: 確認最近化療/放療/免疫治療時間、最高體溫、ANC 或最近 CBC、感染灶、血壓與意識狀態。 / Clarify recent chemotherapy, radiation, or immunotherapy timing, maximum temperature, ANC or recent CBC, infection source, blood pressure, and mental status.

conditions.summary_zh: 癌症治療後出現嘔吐、意識改變、脫水或循環不穩時，需想到腫瘤溶解造成的代謝異常。
conditions.summary_en: Consider after cancer therapy when vomiting, mental status change, dehydration, or instability suggests metabolic derangement.
ask_next: 確認癌症類型與治療時間、腎功能、尿量、鉀磷鈣尿酸變化、心律或抽搐症狀。 / Clarify cancer type and treatment timing, renal function, urine output, potassium, phosphate, calcium, uric acid changes, rhythm, or seizure symptoms.

conditions.summary_zh: 已知癌症合併背痛、骨痛、神經缺損或膀胱腸道功能改變時，需優先排除脊髓壓迫。
conditions.summary_en: Known cancer with back or bone pain, neurologic deficit, or bladder/bowel dysfunction requires urgent exclusion.
ask_next: 確認癌症史、背痛位置與進展、步態、肌力、感覺、反射、鞍區感覺與膀胱腸道功能。 / Clarify cancer history, back pain location and tempo, gait, strength, sensation, reflexes, saddle sensation, and bladder or bowel function.

conditions.summary_zh: 已知癌症合併意識改變、嘔吐、多渴多尿、脫水或虛弱時，需納入高血鈣相關風險。
conditions.summary_en: Known cancer with confusion, vomiting, thirst/polyuria, dehydration, or weakness should prompt hypercalcemia consideration.
ask_next: 確認癌症史、補充品或藥物、口渴多尿、便秘、意識狀態、脫水與近期鈣/腎功能數值。 / Clarify cancer history, supplements or medications, thirst/polyuria, constipation, mental status, dehydration, and recent calcium or renal values.

conditions.summary_zh: 疲倦、發燒、容易瘀青出血、骨痛或體重減輕組合時，需納入急性白血病與血球異常。
conditions.summary_en: Fatigue, fever, easy bruising or bleeding, bone pain, or weight loss should include acute leukemia in the differential.
ask_next: 確認瘀青出血、感染、骨痛、淋巴結或肝脾腫大、CBC 差異計數與周邊血抹片資訊。 / Clarify bruising or bleeding, infection, bone pain, lymph nodes or hepatosplenomegaly, CBC differential, and peripheral smear information.

conditions.summary_zh: 呼吸困難、胸膜性胸痛、咳血、單側腿腫或心搏過速時需考慮。
conditions.summary_en: Consider with dyspnea, pleuritic pain, hemoptysis, unilateral leg swelling, or tachycardia.
ask_next: 確認 VTE 風險、近期手術/臥床、癌症、懷孕、血氧與是否休克。 / Check VTE risks, recent surgery/immobility, cancer, pregnancy, oxygenation, and shock.

conditions.summary_zh: 撕裂樣胸背痛、神經症狀、昏厥或血流不穩需立即排除。
conditions.summary_en: Tearing chest/back pain with neurologic symptoms, syncope, or instability is high risk.
ask_next: 確認疼痛是否突然、撕裂或移動，雙側血壓/脈搏差、神經缺損與馬凡特徵。 / Clarify sudden tearing/migrating pain, pulse/BP differential, neurologic deficits, and connective tissue risk.

conditions.summary_zh: 突發肢體劇痛、蒼白、冰冷、感覺異常、無脈或無力時需優先排除急性肢體缺血。
conditions.summary_en: Sudden severe limb pain with pallor, coldness, sensory change, pulselessness, or weakness is a limb-threatening pattern.
ask_next: 確認 6 Ps：pain、pallor、pulselessness、paresthesia、paralysis、poikilothermia，並記錄症狀開始時間。 / Check the 6 Ps: pain, pallor, pulselessness, paresthesia, paralysis, and poikilothermia, and document onset time.
確認心房顫動、血管病史、抗凝血狀態、外傷/介入史、感覺或運動缺損與血流不穩。 / Ask about atrial fibrillation, vascular history, anticoagulation, trauma or procedure history, sensory or motor deficits, and instability.

conditions.summary_zh: 急性單一紅熱腫痛關節、活動受限、發燒或免疫低下時，需優先納入關節感染。
conditions.summary_en: An acute hot swollen painful joint with restricted movement, fever, or immunocompromise should prioritize septic arthritis.
ask_next: 確認是否為單一急性紅熱腫痛關節、主動與被動活動是否受限、是否發燒、免疫低下、人工關節、近期關節處置或全身敗血症表現。 / Clarify monoarticular hot swollen joint, active and passive range limitation, fever, immunocompromise, prosthetic joint, recent joint procedure, or systemic sepsis features.

conditions.summary_zh: 創傷後劇痛、被動伸展痛、筋膜腔緊繃或神經血管症狀時，需優先辨識肢體威脅模式。
conditions.summary_en: Severe post-trauma limb pain, pain with passive stretch, tense compartment, or neurovascular symptoms should prioritize acute compartment syndrome.
ask_next: 確認疼痛是否與傷勢不成比例、被動伸展是否加劇、筋膜腔是否緊繃，以及感覺、運動、脈搏、皮膚溫度與受傷時間。 / Clarify pain out of proportion, pain with passive stretch, compartment tenseness, sensory or motor change, pulses, skin temperature, and time from injury.

conditions.summary_zh: 發燒、頸部僵硬、意識改變或免疫低下合併頭痛時需考慮。
conditions.summary_en: Consider with fever, neck stiffness, altered mental status, or immunocompromise.
ask_next: 確認皮疹、光畏、免疫狀態、抗生素前血培與是否需要急診處置。 / Ask about rash, photophobia, immune status, cultures before antibiotics, and emergency care needs.

conditions.summary_zh: 雷擊樣頭痛或數秒內達最痛程度時必須優先排除。
conditions.summary_en: Thunderclap headache or maximal intensity within seconds is a must-not-miss pattern.
ask_next: 確認達峰時間、昏厥、頸部僵硬、抗凝血藥與神經缺損。 / Confirm time to peak, syncope, neck stiffness, anticoagulants, and neurologic deficits.

conditions.summary_zh: 右下腹痛、發燒、嘔吐或反彈痛時需納入。
conditions.summary_en: Include with right lower quadrant pain, fever, vomiting, or peritoneal signs.
ask_next: 確認疼痛移轉、食慾、反彈痛、防禦、懷孕可能與是否需影像/外科評估。 / Ask about migration, appetite, rebound/guarding, pregnancy possibility, imaging, and surgical evaluation.

conditions.summary_zh: 可能懷孕者出現骨盆或腹痛、昏厥或血流不穩時不可漏掉。
conditions.summary_en: Must not miss in possible pregnancy with pelvic/abdominal pain, syncope, or instability.
ask_next: 確認妊娠狀態、末次月經、陰道出血、暈厥與血流動力。 / Confirm pregnancy status, LMP, vaginal bleeding, syncope, and hemodynamics.

conditions.summary_zh: 臉唇舌腫、皮疹、呼吸窘迫或血流不穩需立即處置。
conditions.summary_en: Facial/lip/tongue swelling, rash, respiratory distress, or instability needs immediate action.
ask_next: 確認暴露物、氣道腫脹、喘鳴、血壓與是否需立即急救。 / Identify exposure, airway swelling, wheeze, blood pressure, and emergency treatment need.

conditions.summary_zh: 發燒、咳嗽痰、呼吸困難或低氧表現時需考慮。
conditions.summary_en: Consider with fever, cough/sputum, dyspnea, or hypoxemia features.
ask_next: 確認血氧、呼吸頻率、胸痛、痰性質、共病與是否需要影像。 / Check oxygenation, respiratory rate, chest pain, sputum, comorbidities, and imaging need.

conditions.summary_zh: 呼吸困難合併端坐呼吸、水腫或胸痛時需考慮。
conditions.summary_en: Dyspnea with orthopnea, edema, or chest pain may reflect heart failure exacerbation.
ask_next: 確認體重變化、端坐呼吸、下肢水腫、心臟病史、血氧與胸痛。 / Ask about weight change, orthopnea, edema, cardiac history, oxygenation, and chest pain.

conditions.name_zh: 氣喘或 COPD 急性惡化
conditions.summary_zh: 喘鳴、呼吸困難、咳嗽痰或呼吸窘迫時需納入。
conditions.summary_en: Wheeze, dyspnea, cough/sputum, or respiratory distress should trigger this pathway.
ask_next: 確認既往氣喘/COPD、吸入藥反應、血氧、說話能力與沉默胸。 / Check asthma/COPD history, inhaler response, oxygenation, speech ability, and silent chest.

conditions.name_zh: 急性隅角閉鎖性青光眼
conditions.summary_zh: 眼痛、紅眼、頭痛、噁心或視覺改變時需急症處理。
conditions.summary_en: Eye pain/redness with headache, nausea, or vision change can be an emergency.
ask_next: 確認視力、瞳孔、眼壓風險、噁心嘔吐與是否需眼科急診。 / Check vision, pupil, IOP risk, nausea/vomiting, and urgent ophthalmology need.

conditions.summary_zh: 黑便、吐血、血便、昏厥或血流不穩時需優先評估。
conditions.summary_en: Melena, hematemesis, hematochezia, syncope, or instability requires prompt assessment.
ask_next: 確認出血型態、量、抗凝血藥、血壓心跳、貧血症狀與肝病史。 / Clarify bleeding type/volume, anticoagulants, vitals, anemia symptoms, and liver disease.

conditions.summary_zh: 多渴多尿、嘔吐、腹痛、意識改變或呼吸異常時需考慮。
conditions.summary_en: Thirst/polyuria with vomiting, abdominal pain, altered mental status, or abnormal breathing is high risk.
ask_next: 確認血糖、酮體、脫水、感染誘因、胰島素中斷與意識狀態。 / Check glucose, ketones, dehydration, infection triggers, insulin omission, and mental status.

conditions.summary_zh: 意識改變、昏厥、冒汗或低血糖風險者需立即確認血糖。
conditions.summary_en: Altered mental status, syncope, sweating, or hypoglycemia risk should trigger glucose check.
ask_next: 立即確認指尖血糖、糖尿病藥物、進食狀況與意識安全。 / Check point-of-care glucose, diabetes medications, intake, and mental status safety.

conditions.summary_zh: 50歲後新發頭痛、下顎跛行或視覺症狀時需優先排除。
conditions.summary_en: New headache after age 50 with jaw claudication or visual symptoms is high risk.
ask_next: 確認年齡、顳部壓痛、下顎跛行、視覺症狀與近端肌痛。 / Confirm age, temporal tenderness, jaw claudication, visual symptoms, and proximal myalgia.

conditions.summary_zh: 發燒、腰側痛與排尿症狀支持上泌尿道感染。
conditions.summary_en: Fever, flank pain, and urinary symptoms support upper urinary tract infection.
ask_next: 確認發燒、腰側敲痛、排尿症狀、懷孕、敗血症徵象與嘔吐。 / Ask about fever, CVA tenderness, urinary symptoms, pregnancy, sepsis signs, and vomiting.

conditions.summary_zh: 右上腹痛、飯後疼痛、發燒或黃疸時需考慮膽道疾病。
conditions.summary_en: RUQ pain, postprandial pain, fever, or jaundice suggests biliary pathology.
ask_next: 確認黃疸、發燒、Murphy sign、飯後痛、肝膽胰檢驗與是否感染。 / Check jaundice, fever, Murphy sign, postprandial pain, hepatobiliary labs, and infection.

conditions.summary_zh: 咳嗽、發燒、疲倦但無不穩定或呼吸窘迫時列入常見原因。
conditions.summary_en: Common when cough, fever, and fatigue occur without instability or respiratory distress.
ask_next: 確認血氧、呼吸窘迫、免疫狀態、暴露史與需要檢測或隔離。 / Check oxygenation, distress, immune status, exposure, and testing/isolation needs.

conditions.summary_zh: 在排除急性心肺、神經、代謝風險後，可納入焦慮或恐慌。
conditions.summary_en: Consider only after acute cardiopulmonary, neurologic, and metabolic risks are addressed.
ask_next: 先確認沒有 ACS、肺栓塞、低血糖、甲狀腺或物質相關風險。 / First rule out ACS, PE, hypoglycemia, thyroid, or substance-related risk.

conditions.summary_zh: 單側下肢腫脹或疼痛時需考慮，並評估肺栓塞風險。
conditions.summary_en: Consider with unilateral leg swelling or pain, and assess pulmonary embolism risk.
ask_next: 確認 VTE 風險、近期手術、臥床、癌症、懷孕與肺栓塞症狀。 / Check VTE risks, recent surgery, immobility, cancer, pregnancy, and PE symptoms.

conditions.summary_zh: 突發胸痛或呼吸困難，尤其外傷或呼吸窘迫時需排除。
conditions.summary_en: Sudden chest pain or dyspnea, especially with trauma or distress, should prompt exclusion.
ask_next: 確認是否張力氣胸表現、外傷、血氧、呼吸音不對稱與血流不穩。 / Check tension features, trauma, oxygenation, asymmetric breath sounds, and instability.

conditions.summary_zh: 嚴重高血壓合併神經、胸痛、呼吸困難或腎功能風險時需急症評估。
conditions.summary_en: Severe hypertension with neurologic, chest, dyspnea, or kidney-risk features needs urgent evaluation.
ask_next: 確認血壓數值、終端器官損傷症狀、用藥中斷與妊娠相關風險。 / Confirm BP, end-organ symptoms, medication interruption, and pregnancy-related risk.

conditions.summary_zh: 上腹痛、嘔吐、膽道線索或酒精相關風險時需考慮。
conditions.summary_en: Consider with upper abdominal pain, vomiting, biliary clues, or alcohol-related risk.
ask_next: 確認疼痛是否放射到背部、酒精、膽石、三酸甘油脂與脫水或休克。 / Ask about back radiation, alcohol, gallstones, triglycerides, dehydration, or shock.

conditions.summary_zh: 腹痛合併嘔吐、腹脹、停止排氣排便或手術史時需考慮。
conditions.summary_en: Abdominal pain with vomiting, distension, obstipation, or surgical history suggests obstruction.
ask_next: 確認腹脹、排氣排便、手術史、疝氣、發燒與腹膜刺激。 / Check distension, flatus/stool, surgery, hernia, fever, and peritoneal signs.

conditions.summary_zh: 反彈痛、防禦、劇烈腹痛或血流不穩時需急症處理。
conditions.summary_en: Rebound, guarding, severe abdominal pain, or instability requires urgent action.
ask_next: 確認防禦、反彈痛、發燒、血流動力與是否需急診外科評估。 / Confirm guarding, rebound, fever, hemodynamics, and surgical emergency need.

conditions.summary_zh: 突發劇烈腹痛，尤其疼痛與理學檢查不成比例、合併嘔吐或血性腹瀉時需優先排除。
conditions.summary_en: Sudden severe abdominal pain, especially pain out of proportion to exam with vomiting or bloody diarrhea, is a must-not-miss pattern.
ask_next: 確認腹痛是否突發、劇烈、定位不明，並評估是否與觸診或理學檢查不成比例。 / Clarify whether abdominal pain is sudden, severe, poorly localized, and out of proportion to exam findings.

確認心房顫動、動脈粥樣硬化、近期心肌梗塞、低血流狀態、嘔吐、腹瀉、血便、腹膜炎徵象與血流不穩。 / Check atrial fibrillation, atherosclerotic disease, recent MI, low-flow states, vomiting, diarrhea, blood in stool, peritonitis signs, and instability.

conditions.summary_zh: 腰側絞痛、血尿或噁心嘔吐時列入，但需排除感染阻塞。
conditions.summary_en: Flank colic, hematuria, or vomiting suggests stone; exclude infected obstruction.
ask_next: 確認發燒、單腎、懷孕、尿量、血尿與感染徵象。 / Check fever, solitary kidney, pregnancy, urine output, hematuria, and infection signs.

conditions.summary_zh: 排尿疼痛、頻尿或急尿但無發燒腰痛時可考慮。
conditions.summary_en: Dysuria, frequency, or urgency without fever/flank pain may fit lower UTI.
ask_next: 確認發燒、腰痛、懷孕、男性、免疫低下與反覆感染。 / Check fever, flank pain, pregnancy, male sex, immunocompromise, and recurrence.

conditions.summary_zh: 無法排尿、下腹脹痛或膀胱膨脹感時，需優先辨識急性尿滯留與阻塞風險。
conditions.summary_en: Inability to void with lower abdominal pain, distention, or bladder fullness should prioritize acute urinary retention.
ask_next: 確認最後排尿時間、下腹膨脹/疼痛、尿量、前列腺或神經病史、近期手術/麻醉、抗膽鹼或鴉片類藥物。 / Clarify last void, suprapubic distention or pain, urine output, prostate or neurologic history, recent surgery or anesthesia, and anticholinergic or opioid exposure.

conditions.summary_zh: 嘔吐、腹痛、發燒或群聚暴露時列入常見原因。
conditions.summary_en: Vomiting, abdominal pain, fever, or exposure clusters can suggest gastroenteritis.
ask_next: 確認脫水、血便、免疫低下、旅遊、食物暴露與腹膜刺激。 / Check dehydration, bloody stool, immunocompromise, travel, food exposure, and peritoneal signs.

conditions.summary_zh: 反覆頭痛合併噁心、畏光或類似既往型態時可考慮；需先排除紅旗。
conditions.summary_en: Recurrent headache with nausea, photophobia, or prior pattern can fit migraine after red flags are excluded.
ask_next: 先確認雷擊樣頭痛、神經缺損、發燒、頸僵硬、外傷與50歲後新發。 / First check thunderclap, neurologic deficit, fever, neck stiffness, trauma, and new headache after 50.

conditions.summary_zh: 雙側壓迫感、非突發且無紅旗時可考慮。
conditions.summary_en: Bilateral pressure-like headache without sudden onset or red flags can fit this pattern.
ask_next: 確認沒有紅旗、藥物過度使用、視覺症狀或感染線索。 / Confirm no red flags, medication overuse, visual symptoms, or infection clues.

conditions.summary_zh: 癌症史、免疫低下、神經缺損或50歲後新發頭痛時需考慮。
conditions.summary_en: Cancer history, immunocompromise, neurologic deficit, or new headache after 50 raises concern.
ask_next: 確認癌症史、癲癇、晨間嘔吐、進行性惡化與神經缺損。 / Ask about cancer, seizure, morning vomiting, progression, and neurologic deficits.

conditions.name_en: Concussion or mild traumatic brain injury
conditions.summary_zh: 近期頭部外傷後頭痛、暈眩、嘔吐或意識改變需評估。
conditions.summary_en: Headache, dizziness, vomiting, or mental status change after head trauma needs assessment.
ask_next: 確認失去意識、抗凝血藥、反覆嘔吐、神經缺損與頭痛惡化。 / Check loss of consciousness, anticoagulants, repeated vomiting, deficits, and worsening headache.

conditions.summary_zh: 發燒、心搏過速、意識改變或嚴重全身症狀時需考慮。
conditions.summary_en: Fever, tachycardia, altered mental status, or severe systemic illness can suggest thyroid storm.
ask_next: 確認甲亢病史、誘發感染、體溫、心律、腸胃症狀與意識。 / Check hyperthyroidism history, infection trigger, temperature, rhythm, GI symptoms, and mentation.

conditions.summary_zh: 疲倦、體重變化、怕冷或心搏慢等慢性表現時可納入。
conditions.summary_en: Fatigue, weight change, cold intolerance, or bradycardic chronic presentations may fit.
ask_next: 確認症狀時間軸、藥物、甲狀腺病史與是否有低體溫或意識改變。 / Check timeline, medications, thyroid history, hypothermia, and mental status.

conditions.summary_zh: 血流不穩、嘔吐、腹痛、疲倦或類固醇中斷時需考慮。
conditions.summary_en: Instability, vomiting, abdominal pain, fatigue, or steroid interruption can suggest adrenal crisis.
ask_next: 確認類固醇使用、中斷、感染壓力、低血壓、低血糖與電解質。 / Check steroid use/cessation, infection stress, hypotension, hypoglycemia, and electrolytes.

conditions.summary_zh: 疲倦、呼吸困難、昏厥或腸胃道出血線索時可納入。
conditions.summary_en: Fatigue, dyspnea, syncope, or GI bleeding clues can suggest anemia.
ask_next: 確認出血、月經、黑便、營養、慢性病、心肺症狀與 CBC。 / Ask about bleeding, menses, melena, nutrition, chronic disease, cardiopulmonary symptoms, and CBC.

conditions.summary_zh: 非預期體重減輕、疲倦、夜間症狀或局部持續症狀需安排評估。
conditions.summary_en: Unintentional weight loss, fatigue, night symptoms, or persistent focal symptoms need evaluation.
ask_next: 確認體重減輕幅度、夜汗、發燒、出血、局部症狀與篩檢史。 / Check amount of weight loss, night sweats, fever, bleeding, focal symptoms, and screening history.

conditions.summary_zh: 幻覺、妄想、思考或行為混亂、嚴重激動或新發精神病性症狀時需納入。
conditions.summary_en: Hallucinations, delusions, disorganized thinking or behavior, severe agitation, or new psychotic symptoms should be included.
ask_next: 確認起始時間、幻覺/妄想內容、思考或行為混亂、激動程度、物質或藥物暴露、譫妄/神經/內分泌等醫療原因與自傷/傷人安全風險。 / Clarify onset, hallucination or delusion content, disorganized thought or behavior, agitation, substance or medication exposure, delirium, neurologic, endocrine or other medical causes, and self-harm or violence safety risk.

conditions.summary_zh: 睡眠需求降低、活動量或語速增加、衝動高風險行為或精神病性症狀時需納入。
conditions.summary_en: Decreased need for sleep, increased activity or pressured speech, risky impulsive behavior, or psychotic symptoms should include mania or hypomania.
ask_next: 確認睡眠需求、精力/活動量、語速或思緒奔逸、誇大、衝動風險行為、精神病性症狀、物質/藥物誘發與立即安全風險。 / Clarify sleep need, energy or activity, pressured speech or racing thoughts, grandiosity, risky impulsive behavior, psychotic symptoms, substance or medication triggers, and immediate safety risk.

conditions.summary_zh: 限制飲食、體重恐懼、暴食或清除行為合併體重下降、昏厥、低血糖或嘔吐時需納入。
conditions.summary_en: Restrictive eating, weight fear, bingeing, or purging with weight loss, syncope, hypoglycemia, or vomiting should be included.
ask_next: 確認限制飲食、暴食/清除行為、體重變化、昏厥/心悸、嘔吐或瀉藥/利尿劑使用、低血糖或電解質風險、自傷風險與是否有醫療不穩定。 / Clarify restriction, bingeing or purging, weight trajectory, syncope or palpitations, vomiting or laxative/diuretic use, hypoglycemia or electrolyte risk, self-harm risk, and medical instability.

conditions.summary_zh: 疲倦、睡眠或食慾改變、情緒低落時可納入；需主動評估自傷風險。
conditions.summary_en: Low mood with fatigue, sleep, or appetite change can fit; screen for self-harm risk.
ask_next: 確認自殺意念、自傷計畫、精神病症狀、物質使用與支持系統。 / Check suicidal ideation, self-harm plan, psychosis, substances, and supports.

conditions.summary_zh: 任何自殺意念、計畫、近期自傷或安全疑慮都需立即安全評估。
conditions.summary_en: Any suicidal ideation, plan, recent self-harm, or safety concern requires immediate safety assessment.
ask_next: 直接詢問意念、計畫、手段、時間、保護因子與是否需要立即安全處置。 / Ask directly about ideation, plan, means, timing, protective factors, and immediate safety needs.

conditions.summary_zh: 急性意識或注意力波動需找感染、代謝、藥物或中樞病因。
conditions.summary_en: Acute fluctuating attention or consciousness requires evaluation for infection, metabolic, medication, or CNS causes.
ask_next: 確認基準認知、急性時間軸、感染、藥物、疼痛、尿滯留、低氧與血糖。 / Check baseline cognition, acute timeline, infection, medications, pain, retention, hypoxia, and glucose.

conditions.summary_zh: 意識改變、昏厥、心搏過速、嘔吐或自傷疑慮時需詢問暴露。
conditions.summary_en: Altered mental status, syncope, tachycardia, vomiting, or self-harm concern should prompt exposure history.
ask_next: 確認藥物清單、劑量、時間、意圖、共同攝入、心電圖與毒物中心。 / Check medication list, dose, timing, intent, co-ingestions, ECG, and poison control.

conditions.summary_zh: 燃燒或密閉空間暴露後出現意識改變、昏厥、嘔吐、胸痛或多人相似症狀時需優先排除。
conditions.summary_en: Prioritize after combustion or enclosed-space exposure, especially with altered mental status, syncope, vomiting, chest pain, or multiple people with similar symptoms.
ask_next: 確認是否有瓦斯、暖爐、發電機、車庫、火災或密閉空間燃燒暴露，以及同住或同場域多人是否有相似症狀。 / Ask about gas, heaters, generators, garages, fire, or enclosed combustion exposure, and whether others in the same setting have similar symptoms.
確認頭痛、暈眩、虛弱、嘔吐、胸痛、呼吸困難、意識改變、昏厥與心血管/神經高風險表現。 / Check headache, dizziness, weakness, vomiting, chest pain, dyspnea, altered mental status, syncope, and cardiovascular or neurologic high-risk features.

conditions.summary_zh: 發燒、心搏過速、意識改變、冒汗或相關藥物暴露時需考慮。
conditions.summary_en: Fever, tachycardia, altered mental status, diaphoresis, or serotonergic exposure suggests risk.
ask_next: 確認 SSRI/SNRI/MAOI、止痛藥、娛樂用藥、肌陣攣、反射亢進與體溫。 / Check serotonergic drugs, analgesics, recreational drugs, clonus, hyperreflexia, and temperature.

conditions.summary_zh: 高溫暴露合併意識改變、發燒或血流不穩需立即處理。
conditions.summary_en: Heat exposure with altered mental status, hyperthermia, or instability is an emergency.
ask_next: 確認環境暴露、核心體溫、意識、脫水、橫紋肌溶解與立即降溫。 / Check exposure, core temperature, mental status, dehydration, rhabdomyolysis, and cooling need.

conditions.summary_zh: 低溫暴露或低體溫合併意識改變、心律或血流問題時需急症處理。
conditions.summary_en: Cold exposure or hypothermia with mental status, rhythm, or hemodynamic issues is high risk.
ask_next: 確認核心體溫、暴露時間、心律、血糖、外傷與復溫安全。 / Check core temperature, exposure duration, rhythm, glucose, trauma, and rewarming safety.

conditions.summary_zh: 皮膚紅腫熱痛合併發燒或免疫低下時需評估感染嚴重度。
conditions.summary_en: Skin erythema, warmth, swelling, and pain with fever or immunocompromise needs severity assessment.
ask_next: 確認範圍擴大、疼痛程度、膿瘍、糖尿病、免疫低下與壞死感染紅旗。 / Check spread, pain severity, abscess, diabetes, immunocompromise, and necrotizing red flags.

conditions.summary_zh: 眼瞼紅腫合併眼球轉動痛、眼球突出、視力改變、發燒或眼球活動受限時，需優先辨識眼眶感染。
conditions.summary_en: Eyelid swelling or redness with painful eye movement, proptosis, vision change, fever, or impaired eye movement should prioritize orbital cellulitis.
ask_next: 確認是否有眼球轉動痛、眼球突出、複視、視力下降、眼球活動受限、發燒、鼻竇症狀、兒童族群或顱內併發警訊。 / Clarify pain with eye movement, proptosis, diplopia, decreased visual acuity, impaired ocular motility, fever, sinus symptoms, pediatric context, or intracranial complication clues.

conditions.summary_zh: 劇痛、血流不穩、發燒或快速惡化皮膚感染需立即排除。
conditions.summary_en: Severe pain, instability, fever, or rapidly worsening skin infection must be excluded.
ask_next: 確認疼痛是否超出外觀、快速擴大、水泡、皮膚壞死、休克與外科急症需求。 / Check pain out of proportion, rapid spread, bullae, necrosis, shock, and surgical emergency need.

conditions.summary_zh: 局部化膿、紅腫熱痛、壓痛或發燒時需與蜂窩性組織炎及深部感染區分。
conditions.summary_en: Purulence, localized warmth, swelling, tenderness, or fever should distinguish abscess from cellulitis or deeper infection.
ask_next: 確認是否有膿液或波動感、紅腫熱痛範圍、發燒、免疫低下、快速擴大、深部位置與是否需程序或影像評估。 / Clarify purulence or fluctuance, erythema/warmth/tenderness extent, fever, immunocompromise, rapid spread, deep location, and need for procedural or imaging evaluation.

conditions.summary_zh: 疼痛、刺痛或搔癢後出現單側皮節水泡疹，尤其眼部或免疫低下者需優先辨識。
conditions.summary_en: Pain, tingling, or itching followed by unilateral dermatomal vesicles should identify herpes zoster, especially with eye involvement or immunocompromise.
ask_next: 確認皮疹是否沿單側皮節、疼痛/刺痛先於皮疹、眼耳受侵犯、免疫低下、散播性皮疹與神經併發症線索。 / Clarify unilateral dermatomal distribution, pain or tingling before rash, eye or ear involvement, immunocompromise, disseminated rash, and neurologic complication clues.

conditions.name_zh: 史蒂文斯-強森症候群 / 毒性表皮壞死溶解症
conditions.summary_zh: 新用藥後發燒、皮疹快速擴大、黏膜病灶、皮膚水泡或脫落時需立即排除。
conditions.summary_en: Fever, rapidly spreading rash, mucosal lesions, blistering, or sloughing after medication exposure must raise SJS/TEN concern.
ask_next: 確認近期新藥或高風險藥物、發燒、皮疹擴大速度、口眼生殖器黏膜病灶、皮膚水泡/脫落、疼痛、體表面積與血流動力。 / Clarify recent new or high-risk medications, fever, rash spread, oral/ocular/genital mucosal lesions, blistering or sloughing, pain, body surface area, and hemodynamics.

conditions.summary_zh: 黃疸合併意識改變、出血或毒物/藥物暴露需急症評估。
conditions.summary_en: Jaundice with altered mental status, bleeding, or toxic/medication exposure is high risk.
ask_next: 確認乙醯胺酚、病毒性肝炎、酒精、凝血、低血糖與腦病變。 / Check acetaminophen, viral hepatitis, alcohol, coagulation, hypoglycemia, and encephalopathy.

conditions.summary_zh: 尿量下降、脫水、感染、藥物或阻塞線索時需考慮。
conditions.summary_en: Reduced urine output, dehydration, infection, medications, or obstruction clues can suggest AKI.
ask_next: 確認尿量、腎毒性藥物、脫水、感染、阻塞、電解質與肌酸酐。 / Check urine output, nephrotoxins, dehydration, infection, obstruction, electrolytes, and creatinine.

conditions.summary_zh: 發燒、咳嗽、疲倦或呼吸症狀時列入，但需看低氧與高風險族群。
conditions.summary_en: Fever, cough, fatigue, or respiratory symptoms fit; assess oxygenation and high-risk status.
ask_next: 確認暴露、疫苗、高風險共病、血氧、呼吸窘迫與檢測時機。 / Check exposure, vaccination, high-risk comorbidities, oxygenation, distress, and testing timing.

conditions.summary_zh: 慢性咳嗽、體重減輕、發燒或免疫低下時需納入。
conditions.summary_en: Chronic cough, weight loss, fever, or immunocompromise should prompt consideration.
ask_next: 確認咳嗽時間、夜汗、接觸史、旅居、免疫狀態與感染管制需求。 / Check cough duration, night sweats, contacts, travel/residence, immune status, and infection control.

conditions.summary_zh: 上腹痛、腸胃道出血、NSAID 或幽門螺旋桿菌風險時可納入。
conditions.summary_en: Epigastric pain, GI bleeding, NSAID exposure, or H. pylori risk can fit.
ask_next: 確認黑便、吐血、NSAID、抗凝血藥、體重減輕與穿孔紅旗。 / Check melena, hematemesis, NSAIDs, anticoagulants, weight loss, and perforation red flags.

conditions.summary_zh: 胸口灼熱或飯後/躺下惡化可納入，但需先排除心肺紅旗。
conditions.summary_en: Heartburn or postprandial/recumbent worsening can fit after cardiopulmonary red flags are excluded.
ask_next: 先確認 ACS 紅旗；再問吞嚥困難、體重減輕、出血、夜間症狀與藥物。 / First check ACS red flags; then ask dysphagia, weight loss, bleeding, nocturnal symptoms, and medications.

conditions.summary_zh: 懷孕或產後可能性合併持續頭痛、視覺改變、右上腹痛、意識改變或抽搐警訊時，需優先辨識子癲前症或子癲症。
conditions.summary_en: Possible pregnancy or postpartum context with persistent headache, vision change, right upper abdominal pain, altered mental status, or seizure concern should prioritize preeclampsia or eclampsia.
ask_next: 確認孕期或產後狀態、血壓資料是否可取得、持續頭痛、視覺改變、右上腹或上腹痛、臉手腫脹、意識改變、抽搐、胎兒/產科警訊與需要即時產科評估的情境。 / Clarify pregnancy or postpartum status, whether blood pressure data are available, persistent headache, visual symptoms, RUQ or epigastric pain, face or hand swelling, altered mental status, seizure concern, fetal or obstetric red flags, and need for immediate obstetric evaluation.

conditions.summary_zh: 骨盆或下腹痛合併發燒、陰道分泌物、不規則出血或子宮頸移動痛時需納入。
conditions.summary_en: Pelvic or lower abdominal pain with fever, discharge, irregular bleeding, or cervical motion tenderness should include PID.
ask_next: 確認下腹/骨盆痛、發燒、陰道分泌物或不規則出血、子宮頸移動痛/子宮或附件壓痛、懷孕可能與是否排除外科急症。 / Clarify lower abdominal or pelvic pain, fever, discharge or irregular bleeding, cervical motion, uterine or adnexal tenderness, pregnancy possibility, and whether surgical emergencies are excluded.

conditions.summary_zh: 骨盆痛合併發燒、劇痛、嘔吐、陰道分泌物或血流不穩時需優先排除。
conditions.summary_en: Pelvic pain with fever, severe pain, vomiting, discharge, or instability should prioritize tubo-ovarian abscess.
ask_next: 確認發燒高度、毒性外觀、單側或雙側骨盆痛、分泌物、嘔吐、腹膜刺激、妊娠狀態與是否需要急症婦科/影像評估。 / Clarify fever severity, toxic appearance, unilateral or bilateral pelvic pain, discharge, vomiting, peritoneal signs, pregnancy status, and need for urgent gynecologic or imaging evaluation.

conditions.summary_zh: 大量或急性陰道/子宮出血合併昏厥、血流不穩或貧血線索時需立即分層。
conditions.summary_en: Heavy or acute vaginal or uterine bleeding with syncope, instability, or anemia clues needs immediate risk stratification.
ask_next: 確認出血量與時間、生命徵象/昏厥、是否有妊娠檢測資訊、貧血或凝血病史、抗凝血藥、產後或停經狀態與婦科急症需求。 / Clarify bleeding volume and timing, vital signs or syncope, whether pregnancy testing information is available, anemia or bleeding disorder history, anticoagulants, postpartum or postmenopausal status, and gynecologic emergency need.

conditions.summary_zh: 突發單側骨盆痛、嘔吐或懷孕可能時需急症評估。
conditions.summary_en: Sudden unilateral pelvic pain with vomiting or pregnancy possibility needs urgent evaluation.
ask_next: 確認疼痛突然性、單側位置、嘔吐、卵巢囊腫史、妊娠與婦科急症需求。 / Check sudden onset, unilateral location, vomiting, ovarian cyst history, pregnancy, and gynecologic emergency need.

conditions.summary_zh: 突發睪丸或下腹/腹股溝痛伴噁心嘔吐時需立即排除。
conditions.summary_en: Sudden testicular, lower abdominal, or groin pain with nausea/vomiting must be excluded.
ask_next: 確認陰囊疼痛、位置、反射、發作時間、嘔吐與立即泌尿科需求。 / Check scrotal pain, position, reflex, onset time, vomiting, and urgent urology need.

Eating Disorders: What You Need to Know
